title: FriendlyFriend
description: adds shampoo biome and bob dimesion and more!
body:
this mod is kinda weird 
it adds shampoo biome with shampoo blocks and shampoo blobs
and it adds shampoo music disc
and it adds bob dimension with bob blocks and more
and it adds some more stuff 


Hope you enjoy!
-bananabara:)

NOTICE!!
you need optifine to run this mod!
it does only work in creative for the moment!
remember this is still in alpha so there is be alot of bugs!


Here is a tutorial that shows you how to make the bob portal

![firstly make this shape with shampoo blocks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/979d6572bc9064445d6cca5f3704be1ee687a9ba.png)

![then place the bob bucket in the shape](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/24feb5722505c8bbd11d8ade6a59c3921e019376.png)

![there you have it the bob portal!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f255dffccb64b79d64367bf8ef34dd781f640d54.png)
